issues.description: Condition missing required check: 'If your Leader is multicolored' → condition should be {"type":"LeaderHasAnyType","types":["Multicolor"]} or similar multicolor check, not "Always"

SearchDeck action incomplete: must specify viewing 3 cards from top of deck before selecting up to 1 card. Current DSL lacks the 'look at 3 cards' mechanic and card placement options (top or bottom of deck)
Filter set to 'Any' but effect allows selection of 'up to 1 card' — filter should constrain count to max 1, and placement logic (top/bottom) is missing from action
